steps.title: Identify the two punctuation rules
steps.content: The critic's name is essential information identifying which critic, so it should not be set off with commas. The quotation is integrated into the sentence after "claims," so no comma is needed before it.

steps.title: Remove unnecessary commas
steps.content: Choices A and B incorrectly place commas around the critic's name. Choice D incorrectly puts commas between the subject and verb and before the integrated quotation. The remaining choice keeps the attribution smooth and correctly unpunctuated. The answer is C.
